REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2366 31st Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Eisenberg for James Herbst.

Mr. Eisenberg stated that he filed the Acknowledgment of Notice, Consent to Sale and Waiver of Further Notice Regarding Sale of Real Property by Amber Haskett, Christopher Tom and Caroline Tom. In addition, Mr. Eisenberg stated that there was an issue with bonding and requested that $500,000.00 from the proceeds of the sale be placed into a blocked account which the Court allowed. The sale was confirmed at $702,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written the order). Status of filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for June 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
